home.tagline: Emergency readiness first. Self-sufficiency for life.
home.hero_title: Build your readiness. Live more self-sufficiently.
home.hero_sub: Take the quizzes, get a personalised plan, and join a global movement of people preparing for the next decade with clear eyes.
home.stats.1.label: people want more independence from broken systems
home.stats.2.label: of households grow none of their own food
home.stats.3.label: self-sufficiency & preparedness market by 2030
home.pillars.sub: Everything you need to build a resilient, self-sufficient life - all in one platform.
home.pillars.emergency.desc: Assess your household readiness and get practical actions for this week, 30 days and one year.
home.pillars.marketplace.desc: Curated products for preparedness, homesteading, and sustainable living. Every item vetted by our community.
home.pillars.library.desc: Books, films, courses, apps, and YouTube resources for emergency readiness and long-term self-sufficiency.
home.pillars.communities.desc: Explore the long-term vision for global self-sufficient communities being planned with partners and investors.
home.pillars.news.desc: Stay informed about global events that impact self-sufficiency. AI-curated news with actionable insights.
home.pillars.plans.desc: Choose Free or Pro and unlock the level of guidance that matches your household needs.
home.score.title: Your Self-Sufficiency Score
home.news.sub: AI-curated global events that impact your self-sufficiency. Not just news - actionable intelligence.
home.news.1.title: European grain exports face new restrictions amid drought concerns
home.news.1.summary: Multiple EU countries announce export limitations as water levels drop to historic lows across major agricultural regions.
home.news.1.why: Food prices likely to rise 15-20% in affected regions. Consider accelerating your food storage plans and exploring local grain alternatives.
home.news.2.title: Natural gas prices surge as winter demand increases
home.news.2.summary: Spot prices reach 18-month highs as storage facilities report below-average reserves heading into peak heating season.
home.news.2.why: Now is the time to audit your heating backup systems. Those with wood stoves or solar thermal should ensure systems are operational.
home.news.3.title: Major grid upgrade delays announced for Eastern seaboard
home.news.3.summary: Utility companies push back modernization timelines by 3-5 years, citing supply chain issues and labor shortages.
home.news.3.why: Grid reliability will remain a concern. Prioritize backup power solutions and consider expanding battery storage capacity.
home.communities.p1: Autarkeia is building a global network of intentional, self-sufficient communities — places where people grow their own food, generate their own energy, build their own homes, and govern themselves transparently.
home.communities.p2: We are in the planning phase. Register your interest through the Communities access in your Plan, tell us where you want to live, and help us demonstrate the demand. Sites will launch in regions where member interest, climate, and conditions line up — starting in Spain and expanding from there.
home.communities.focus.housing.title: Housing & Land
home.communities.focus.housing.desc: Natural building, earthen methods, timber frames, and straw bale homes.
home.communities.focus.food.title: Food Systems
home.communities.focus.food.desc: Communal growing, food forests, regenerative design, and permaculture.
home.communities.focus.energy.title: Energy & Water
home.communities.focus.energy.desc: Off-grid solar, wind, rainwater harvesting, and resilient water systems.
home.communities.focus.governance.title: Governance
home.communities.focus.governance.desc: Transparent co-governance, member participation, and clear decision-making.
home.how.sub: Start your journey to self-sufficiency in four simple steps.
home.how.1.title: Take the Assessment
home.how.1.desc: Answer questions about your current situation, resources, and goals. Our AI analyzes 47 factors across 5 categories.
home.how.2.title: Get Your Roadmap
home.how.2.desc: Receive a personalized plan with prioritized actions based on your location, budget, and timeline.
home.how.3.title: Track Progress
home.how.3.desc: Monitor your self-sufficiency score as you complete tasks. Celebrate milestones and adjust your plan as needed.
home.how.4.title: Build Resilience
home.how.4.desc: Connect with community, access resources, and continuously improve. True independence is a journey, not a destination.
auth.signup_sub_account: Free to start. Get your self-sufficiency score today.
auth.signup_sub_profile: These details help personalise your Autarkeia dashboard.
auth.terms_agree: By creating an account you agree to our
auth.error_email_password: Enter an email address and password to continue.
auth.error_name_required: First name and last name are required.

auth.reset_sub: Enter your email and we'll send a link to set a new password.
auth.reset_email_sent: Check your email for reset link
auth.use_latest_link: Use the latest reset link from your email.
auth.reset_success: Password reset successful - redirecting to login
auth.error_password_required: Enter and confirm your new password.

quiz.selector.title: Find out where you stand
quiz.selector.sub: Take one of our tests to discover your current level of readiness and get personalised recommendations.
quiz.self-sufficiency.card_desc: Discover how self-sufficient your household truly is. From food production to energy independence, find out where you excel and where you can improve.
quiz.emergency-readiness.card_desc: How ready are you for unexpected disruptions? Assess your water storage, food supplies, medical readiness and backup systems.
quiz.self-sufficiency.title: Self-Sufficiency Test
quiz.self-sufficiency.description: Discover how self-sufficient you really are
quiz.emergency-readiness.title: Emergency Readiness Test
quiz.emergency-readiness.description: Find out how ready you are for emergencies
quiz.page.self.metadata_description: Discover how self-sufficient your household truly is with our 7-question assessment.
quiz.page.emergency.metadata_description: Find out how ready you are for unexpected disruptions with our 7-question assessment.
quiz.results.no_answers: No quiz answers found. Please take the quiz first.
quiz.results.analyze_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
quiz.results.score_beginning: You're at the beginning of your journey. Here's how to get started.
quiz.results.score_progress: You've made some progress. Let's build on what you have.
quiz.results.score_good: Good progress! Focus on strengthening your weak areas.
quiz.results.score_impressive: Impressive! You're well prepared. Here are some final touches.
quiz.results.email_sub: Get your score, category breakdown, and personalized product recommendations by email. No account required — or create an account later from the link in the email to save progress.
quiz.results.take_other: Take the {title} to get a full assessment of your household readiness.
quiz.results.meta_description: View your personalised assessment results and action plan.
quiz.email.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
quiz.email.placeholder_success: Thanks — in production we would email your score breakdown and product recommendations. You can still create an account later to save progress.
quiz.fallback.week.1.title: Store 72 hours of water
quiz.fallback.week.1.description: Buy at minimum 9 litres per person.
quiz.fallback.week.2.title: Audit your food supply
quiz.fallback.week.2.description: Check how many days of food you have at home.
quiz.fallback.week.3.title: Charge a power bank
quiz.fallback.week.3.description: Keep a 20,000mAh power bank charged at all times.
quiz.fallback.month.1.title: Build a 2-week food store
quiz.fallback.month.1.description: Rice, lentils, pasta, and canned goods are a practical base.
quiz.fallback.month.2.title: Buy a water filter
quiz.fallback.month.2.description: A gravity water filter covers core drinking-water needs.
quiz.fallback.month.3.title: Start a small garden
quiz.fallback.month.3.description: Even herbs on a windowsill help build the habit.
quiz.fallback.year.1.title: Install solar backup
quiz.fallback.year.1.description: A 500W panel and battery setup can cover essentials.
quiz.fallback.year.2.title: Learn food preservation
quiz.fallback.year.2.description: Fermentation and dehydrating help extend harvests.
quiz.fallback.year.3.title: Join an Autarkeia community
quiz.fallback.year.3.description: Shared knowledge and shared resources accelerate progress.
quiz.fallback.products.1.name: Berkey water filter
quiz.fallback.products.1.why: Filters tap, well, or collected water to drinking quality.
quiz.fallback.products.2.name: 72-hour emergency food kit
quiz.fallback.products.2.why: Freeze-dried meals with long shelf life for rapid backup.
quiz.fallback.products.3.name: Jackery 500 solar generator
quiz.fallback.products.3.why: Entry-level solar + battery backup for essential devices.
quiz.fallback.products.4.name: Raised bed starter kit
quiz.fallback.products.4.why: A practical first step for producing some of your own food.
quiz.fallback.products.5.name: Comprehensive first aid kit
quiz.fallback.products.5.why: Covers common injuries, burns, and basic trauma care.
quiz.fallback.products.6.name: Solar wind-up radio
quiz.fallback.products.6.why: No batteries required and useful for weather alerts.
quiz.ss-q1.question: Where are you based?
quiz.ss-q2.question: How much of your own food do you currently grow or produce?
quiz.ss-q2.opt.small: A small amount — herbs, a few vegetables
quiz.ss-q2.opt.meaningful: A meaningful portion — seasonal vegetables, some fruit
quiz.ss-q2.opt.significant: A significant portion — year-round food production
quiz.ss-q3.question: What is your water situation?
quiz.ss-q3.opt.stored: I have some stored water (a few days worth)
quiz.ss-q3.opt.multiple: Multiple sources — collection, storage and filtration
quiz.ss-q4.question: How do you power your home?
quiz.ss-q4.opt.grid: Entirely on the grid — no backup
quiz.ss-q4.opt.backup: Grid plus a small generator or power bank
quiz.ss-q4.opt.partial: Some solar panels, partial off-grid capability
quiz.ss-q4.opt.offgrid: Off-grid or near-off-grid — solar, battery, wind
quiz.ss-q5.question: What is your housing situation?
quiz.ss-q5.opt.renting: Renting — no control over the property
quiz.ss-q5.opt.modified: Own home with some self-built or modified elements
quiz.ss-q5.opt.selfbuilt: Self-built, natural-build or fully maintained by me
quiz.ss-q6.question: Which practical self-sufficiency skills do you have?
quiz.ss-q7.question: What is your primary self-sufficiency goal?
quiz.ss-q7.opt.disruptions: Be fully prepared for extended disruptions
quiz.ss-q7.opt.rural: Eventually move to a self-sufficient rural property
quiz.ep-q1.question: Where are you based?
quiz.ep-q2.question: Who are you preparing for?
quiz.ep-q3.question: How much water do you have stored right now?
quiz.ep-q3.opt.none: None — I rely entirely on the tap
quiz.ep-q3.opt.few: A few bottles — less than 24 hours
quiz.ep-q3.opt.weeks: 2+ weeks stored or I have a filtration system
quiz.ep-q4.question: How long could your household eat without going to a shop?
quiz.ep-q5.question: How prepared are you medically?
quiz.ep-q5.opt.none: No first aid kit or supplies
quiz.ep-q5.opt.trained: Full kit, medications, and first aid trained
quiz.ep-q6.question: What backup power and communications do you have?
quiz.ep-q6.opt.plan: I have an emergency family contact plan
quiz.ep-q7.question: What is the disruption you are most worried about?
quiz.ep-q7.opt.supply: Supply chain collapse or food shortage
quiz.ep-q7.opt.civil: Civil unrest or breakdown of services
dashboard.title: Your dashboard
dashboard.guest_sub: Sign in to see your quiz results, action plan, and personalised recommendations. You can also try a demo dashboard below — no real account required.
dashboard.sign_in_card_sub: Use the email or Google login linked to your real Autarkeia account.
dashboard.demo_card_sub: Preview the experience — pick a tier to start. You can switch at any time from inside the dashboard.
dashboard.score_based_on: Based on Emergency Readiness + Self-Sufficiency quizzes.
dashboard.pro_breakdown_locked: Full category breakdown across all 5 categories is available with Pro.
dashboard.plan_locked: Locked. Upgrade to Pro to see your full plan and track progress.
dashboard.free_plan_note: Free shows the first 3 items for this week only. Upgrade to unlock the full 30-day and 1-year plans, edit items, and track progress.
dashboard.marketplace_pro_sub: All vendors and bundles are unlocked. Filter by category and country.
dashboard.marketplace_free_sub: Free members see Amazon listings only. Upgrade to access regional shops, direct-from-maker bundles, and curated brands.
dashboard.library_pro_sub: Every book, article, podcast, course, app, and the 70+ Geopolitics & World Future episodes.
dashboard.library_free_sub: Free members see a taster of each section. Upgrade to unlock the rest, plus all 9 languages.
dashboard.communities_pro_sub: Pro members are first in line when we open pilots. You'll receive private updates as sites get scoped.
dashboard.communities_free_sub: Tell us where you want to live and what model fits your household. Free members get all community development updates.
dashboard.ai_chat_sub: Ask about your scores, location, household, climate, or any of your action items. Claude knows your Autarkeia profile.
dashboard.chat_greeting: Hi — I'm your Autarkeia assistant. Ask me anything about your situation, location, household, or scores.
dashboard.chat_stub: Thanks — once the AI chat backend is wired to Claude this will give you a tailored answer based on your scores, location, and household.
dashboard.delete_account_desc: Permanently delete your Autarkeia account and sign out. This action cannot be undone.
dashboard.delete_confirm_sub: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This cannot be undone.
marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.intro: Emergency readiness and self-sufficiency gear and products curated for practical resilience.
marketplace.unlock_sellers: Unlock more sellers by upgrading to Pro.
library.title: Global Resilience Library
library.intro: A comprehensive emergency readiness and self-sufficiency library. Free members preview a curated taster set; Pro members unlock the full catalogue across all languages.
library.geopolitics_desc: 70+ specific episodes from Peter Zeihan, John Mearsheimer, Stephen Kotkin, Nate Hagens, Professor Jiang (Predictive History), Thomas Homer-Dixon, Adam Tooze, Lyn Alden, Ray Dalio, Vaclav Smil, Joseph Tainter, Yuval Noah Harari and others. Set type to Podcasts and subject to Geopolitics to browse.
library.free_preview_desc: You're seeing a curated taster set. Pro members unlock the full library.
news.title: World News Watch
news.intro: Global risks that matter for emergency readiness and self-sufficiency planning.
news.read_at_source: Read the story at the source
communities.title: The future of self-sufficient living. Built together.
communities.intro: Autarkeia is building a global network of self-sufficient communities — where people grow their own food, generate their own energy, build their own homes, and live free from dependence on fragile systems. We are in the planning phase and looking for people who share this vision.
communities.option.family_desc: Build your own self-sufficient home on your own land. Design and develop your property according to your vision.
communities.option.coliving_desc: Join a group of people building and sharing a house together. Co-own, share resources, and build community while maintaining individual autonomy.
communities.option.communal_living_desc: Live in a shared central building with lower entry cost, shared labour, and the option to build your own subplot home over time.
communities.option.plantation_market_des: Access practical, high-quality food from Autarkeia plantations and partner producers, even if you are not ready to relocate yet.
communities.market.title: A local resilience market, built around your community
communities.market.body: Not everyone wants to relocate immediately. Through Autarkeia plantations and partner producers, you can access practical, high-quality food grown with regenerative methods — even before moving.
communities.market.point_1: Seasonal vegetables, fruit, eggs, dairy, honey, grains and preserves
communities.market.point_2: Pickup and delivery zones prioritized by community demand
communities.market.point_3: Transparent production methods and long-term local supply planning
communities.form.where_live: Where would you like to live? (up to 10 locations)
communities.form.timeline: When are you thinking of making this move?
communities.form.success: Thank you. We have received your interest. We will be in touch as we develop communities in your preferred locations. This data helps us demonstrate demand to investors and partners.
communities.form.success_email: Thank you. We have received your interest and sent a confirmation to your email. We will be in touch as we develop communities in your preferred locations. This data helps us demonstrate demand to investors and partners.
communities.form.error_add_location: Add at least one location from the suggestions.
communities.form.intent: What brings you to Autarkeia communities?
communities.form.intent_option.live: I want to live in a community
communities.form.intent_option.buy_food: I just want to buy food from your plantations
communities.form.food_products: Which products are you interested in?
communities.model.1: Independent family plot — buy your land, build your home, full privacy
communities.model.2: Co-living group — friends or like-minded people sharing a larger property
communities.model.3: Community investor — pool capital with others, Autarkeia develops the site
communities.model.4: Infrastructure subscriber — buy land near our shared solar/food infrastructure, pay monthly fee for access
communities.model.5: Seasonal resident — spend weeks or months per year, no permanent commitment
communities.model.6: Global partner — help us build in your country or region
plans.title: Plans
plans.sub: Two simple tiers: Free and Pro (€7/month).
forums.title: Forums
forums.heading: Autarkeia Forums
forums.intro: Threaded discussions for the practical work of building resilient households and communities. Sign in to post; reading is open to everyone.
forums.external_note: Autarkeia does not operate these spaces — review each community's rules and privacy expectations.
footer.tagline: Emergency readiness first. Self-sufficiency for life.
